cases.note: reads name and folded (>-) description from YAML frontmatter
cases.input:
---
name: orca-cli
description: >-
  Use the orca CLI to drive a running editor;
  keep worktree comments current.
---

# Orca CLI

expected.name: orca-cli
expected.description: Use the orca CLI to drive a running editor; keep worktree comments current.

cases.note: falls back to heading and first paragraph when frontmatter is absent
cases.input:
# Design Review

Use when reviewing UI implementation quality.

expected.name: Design Review
expected.description: Use when reviewing UI implementation quality.

cases.note: empty input yields null name and description (TS emits explicit null, not omitted)
plain body with no heading: name null, description from first paragraph
quoted scalar name; description falls back to first body paragraph past the heading
cases.input:
---
name: "My Skill"
---

# Heading Title

Body paragraph text.

cases.note: list-valued description is not a scalar, so description falls back to first paragraph
cases.input:
---
name: Listy
description:
  - first
  - second
---

# Real Heading

A fallback paragraph.

cases.note: leading BOM is stripped before frontmatter parsing
cases.input:
﻿---
name: bom-skill
description: With BOM
---

# Title

cases.note: literal (|) block scalar description collapses its newlines to single spaces
cases.input:
---
name: block-skill
description: |
  Line one here.
  Line two here.
---

expected.name: block-skill
expected.description: Line one here. Line two here.
